query: In an ElevenLabs agent workflow I have a hub node and an appointment node. I want the conversation to go hub -> appointment and also return to hub if the user changes their mind. I added a second edge from appointment back to hub and got a 422 'Duplicate edge' error. How should I model the round trip?
expected_behavior: identify that the round trip is ONE edge with a backward_condition, not two edges
explain a second edge between the same node pair triggers 422 'Duplicate edge'
tell the user to add backward_condition to the existing forward (hub -> appointment) edge
show the edge shape with forward_condition + backward_condition
notes: Guards the workflow round-trip. Baseline explicitly said it did not know the construct and guessed.
